name: editor4b: select-all + type replaces the whole document and keeps editing (focus preserved across full rebuild)
_note: Regression guard for the whole-document-replace focus-preservation gap (vibe/radiant/Radiant_Issue3.md follow-up). Cmd+A then typing collapses all blocks to one, forcing Radiant's FULL view-tree rebuild, which used to blur the contenteditable host and drop every keystroke after the first. The fix re-focuses the editing host after relayout. All of 'Hello' must land, then Enter splits and 'World' lands in the new block.
